_migration_note: v3.1: Silver paths use nested layout (municipal/entity/ not municipal_entity/). Model names use dots, paths use slashes.

connection.comment: Default for UI only (10-100x faster). All data pipelines (ingestion + model builds) override to 'spark'. Set CONNECTION_TYPE env var to override.

api.comment: API query limits — tune here, not in source code.

defaults.comment: Delta Lake is the default storage format for all Bronze and Silver tables. Provides ACID transactions, time travel, and schema evolution.

roots._comment_domains: Domain-specific roots only needed when path differs from {silver}/{model.replace('.','/')}. Most models use the automatic fallback.

domain_roots._comment: Override storage paths for domains whose silver path doesn't match the canonical name. Paths are relative to silver root.

tables._comment_bronze: Bronze table config comes from endpoint markdown files
tables._note_cook_county: See Data Sources/Endpoints/Cook County Data Portal/*.md
